raw_source.title: [shenzhen] Blockchain R&D
raw_source.body:
QED Protocol is developing horizontal scaling L2 solutions on Dogecoin and Bitcoin. We aim to become the first L2 on PoW chains and bring Web2 user experience to Web3. To achieve this vision, we are building IDE, compiler, VM, zero-knowledge proof circuits, and rollup nodes.

Our investors include leading institutions such as Blockchain Capital, Arrington Capital, and StarkNet etc. Our partners include Polygon, StarkNet, Solana Foundation, and more.

Our team values passion, autonomy, transparency, and work-life balance.

**Blockchain R&D** 
**Responsibilities**

- Research and develop QED VM, Compiler and Rollup Node

**Requirements**

- Experienced in programming languages such as Rust and TypeScript.
- Strong familiarity with Layer 2 solutions (L2s).
- Deep understanding of Zero-Knowledge Proofs (ZKP) principles and frameworks like plonky2.
- Proficient in Solana and Sui ecosystems.
- Well-versed in the mechanisms of common DeFi products such as DEX, Lending, and Orderbook protocols.

Annual salary
$4,0000-$6,0000

E-mail
hr@zklabs.cn

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]

comments.body:
Hi,
I am a senior full-stack blockchain developer with over 8 years of experience.
I am very interested in your projects.
Here's my [resume](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1bPHUCIHQBY4ObOjHx54sj-V9qKjBMM8F/view?usp=sharing).
Looking forward to hearing from you.

Thanks,
Robert
comments.author: trevor0106
